# Scripwise

> Scripwise is a free Indian stock research and screening platform covering NSE & BSE listed companies. It provides financial ratios, P&L/balance sheet/cash-flow data, shareholding patterns, corporate actions, and the Scripwise Score — a transparent, rule-based 0–100 read on a company's fundamentals (no external AI/API calls, purely deterministic).

Scripwise is not a SEBI-registered investment adviser. All data is for informational and educational purposes only and does not constitute investment advice.

## Product

- [Homepage](https://www.scripwise.co.in/): Search, hero market snapshot, and product overview.
- [Explorer](https://www.scripwise.co.in/screener): Free, no-login stock screener — filter 5,000+ NSE & BSE companies by valuation, growth, profitability, and Scripwise Score. Supports CSV export and quick-filter presets.
- [Markets](https://www.scripwise.co.in/markets): Market overview — top gainers/losers, most active, 52-week highs/lows, sector performance, and sector heatmap. Requires a free account.
- [Pre-built Screens](https://www.scripwise.co.in/screens): Ready-made screens for quality, value, income, momentum, and turnaround investing frameworks. Requires a free account.
- [Compare](https://www.scripwise.co.in/compare): Side-by-side comparison of up to 4 companies across 14 fundamental metrics. Requires a free account.
- [Corporate Actions Calendar](https://www.scripwise.co.in/calendar): Dividends, bonuses, splits, rights, buybacks, and board/AGM/EGM meeting dates. Requires a free account.
- [Watchlist](https://www.scripwise.co.in/watchlist): Personal tracked-stocks list with CSV export. Requires a free account.
- Individual stock pages at `/stocks/{SYMBOL}` (e.g. `/stocks/TCS`, `/stocks/RELIANCE`) — company profile, live quote, financial ratios, Scripwise Score with history, and multi-year financial statements.

## Account

- [Sign up](https://www.scripwise.co.in/signup): Free account creation — name, email, city, and investor profile (Beginner through Institutional).
- [Log in](https://www.scripwise.co.in/login): Existing-user sign-in, reachable from the signup page's tab switcher.

## Legal

- [Disclaimer](https://www.scripwise.co.in/disclaimer)
- [Privacy Policy](https://www.scripwise.co.in/privacy)
- [Terms of Use](https://www.scripwise.co.in/terms)

## Notes for automated agents

- The Explorer (`/screener`) is the only research tool that does not require authentication; Markets, Screens, Compare, Calendar, and Watchlist require a free Scripwise account.
- Data is NSE/BSE end-of-day; treat it as informational, not real-time trading data or investment advice.
- `/api/*` routes are internal application endpoints, not a public API, and are disallowed in robots.txt.
